mapper.select: SELECT r.*, e.name AS employee_name, d.disease_name, d.disease_type FROM employee_disease_relation r LEFT JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN disease d ON r.disease_id = d.id WHERE r.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, e.name AS employee_name, d.disease_name, d.disease_type FROM employee_disease_relation r LEFT JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN disease d ON r.disease_id = d.id WHERE r.disease_id = #{diseaseId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_disease_relation (employee_id, disease_id, diagnosis_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{diseaseId}, #{diagnosisTime})
